title: Admission Webhook Good Practices — Match all versions of an API
text:
By default, admission webhooks run on any API versions that affect a specified
resource. The
matchPolicy
field in the webhook configuration controls this
behavior. Specify a value of
Equivalent
in the
matchPolicy
field or omit
the field to allow the webhook to run on any API version.
For details, see
Matching requests:
matchPolicy
.
